name: Accio Work
description: Plug-and-play AI agent platform designed as a no-code taskforce for SMEs. Deploys specialized agents to execute complex, long-horizon operations including market analysis, design, sourcing, store optimization, inventory monitoring, compliance automation, and autonomous supplier negotiations.
capabilities: Automated compliance (VAT, tax, customs) across 100+ markets
Dynamic agent orchestration for parallel execution
pricing: Free with setup; premium tiers for advanced features
notes: Built on Accio platform (10M+ monthly active users). Uses real-time consumer trends and transaction records from Alibaba ecosystems. Security-first approach with sandboxed environments and granular permission management. Emphasizes data sovereignty.
